title: Value & Results
description: Client-visible value, effort, and results data. Shows the Third i-client relationship compounding value over time: increasing value, decreasing time, continued hard work. Reusable across clients — supports completed projects with dollar amounts and in-progress projects with relative value.

metrics.description: Momentum metrics showing the current state of the relationship.

label.description: Plain-English description of what's been delivered.

hours.description: Total Third i hours invested in the relationship.

label.description: Plain-English context (e.g., '20 hours on Film 1 Final Demo').

outcomes.description: Concrete outcomes delivered — defined by the business impact they produce, not just activity.

description.description: What was achieved and why it matters to the client.

status.description: Whether this outcome is done, being worked on, or planned.

projectId.description: Optional link to the project this outcome came from.

capabilities.description: Capabilities Third i has delivered — tools built, knowledge transferred, and services enabled.

type.description: tool = something built and handed over; knowledge = expertise the client now has access to; service = ongoing service now available.

status.description: delivered = done; available = ready to use; planned = coming soon.

narrative.description: The value narrative — how the relationship compounds value over time.

summary.description: One-paragraph summary of the Third i-client value story.

faster.description: How Third i delivers more value in less time as the workflow learns.

smarter.description: How Third i's understanding deepens each project.

expanding.description: How Third i takes on more of the client's work over time.

completedProjects.description: Completed projects with real dollar amounts and effort data. Empty for clients with no completed projects yet (e.g., bkWatch). Populated for clients with completed work (e.g., Shaw).

amount.description: Dollar amount (e.g., '$5,000'). Shown only for completed projects.

outcome.description: What was delivered and the value it produced.
